💡 Suggestions & Feedback
▸
Help us improve!
Have an idea for a new feature? Found a bug? We'd love to hear from you. Your feedback helps us build a better app for everyone.
📞 Customer Service

Need help? We're here for you!
Having issues with the app, your account, or need help with flipping? Send us a message and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
📧 We typically respond within 24 hours
❓ Frequently Asked Questions
▸
🔄 Return Policy
▸
Our Return & Refund Policy

30-Day Return Window: All products purchased through RetailArbitrageHub can be returned within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.

Condition: Items must be in original, unused condition with all tags and packaging intact.

How to Return: Contact our Customer Service team above with your order details and we'll provide a prepaid return label.

Refund Timeline: Refunds are processed within 3-5 business days after we receive the returned item.

Damaged Items: If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us immediately for a free replacement or full refund.

Exchanges: We offer free exchanges for different sizes or colors, subject to availability.

📦 Shipping Information
▸
Shipping & Delivery

Free Shipping: All orders over $25 qualify for free standard shipping within the US.

Standard Shipping: 5-7 business days. Orders under $25 have a flat $4.99 shipping fee.

Express Shipping: 2-3 business days for $9.99. Available at checkout.

Tracking: All orders include tracking numbers sent via email once shipped.

International: International shipping available to select countries. Rates calculated at checkout.

📋 Terms of Service
▸
Terms & Conditions

By using RetailArbitrageHub, you agree to our terms of service. Our platform connects buyers with products from multiple sources for resale opportunities.

Product Listings: Prices and availability are subject to change. We source products from verified suppliers and mark them up to provide competitive resale margins.

Affiliate Links: Some links on our platform are affiliate links. We may earn a commission at no extra cost to you when you purchase through these links.

Account: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and all activity under it.

Modifications: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of updated terms.

🔒 Privacy Policy
▸
Your Privacy Matters

Data Collection: We collect only the information necessary to provide our service — email for notifications, preferences for personalization, and usage data for improvements.

Data Storage: Your data is stored securely on your device using localStorage. We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties.

Cookies: We use essential cookies only to maintain your preferences and session.

Your Rights: You can delete your data at any time through Settings > Clear Data. Contact us for any privacy-related questions.
